meaning: n.新加坡人adj.新加坡的,新加坡人的
examples: Singaporean and South Korean passports provide visa-free access to 162 countries.
Singaporean head chef Tommy Teh Kum Chai offers daily specials on a blackboard, rather than sticking to a menu.
The iron laws of Singaporean electoral arithmetic will prevail, as ever.
Closer to Orchard Road, the giant Zouk and Velvet Underground are popular with Singaporean college students.
The Singaporean pathologists found that Mr. Todd's body showed signs of death by hanging.
